name: Edinburgh Hogmanay Torchlight Procession
venue_name: Edinburgh Old Town (Royal Mile to Holyrood Park)
description: Edinburgh's Hogmanay Torchlight Procession is held on December 30, where thousands of torch-bearers parade through Edinburgh's Old Town from Parliament Square along the Royal Mile to Holyrood Park. It is one of the world's largest New Year's Eve celebrations, kicking off the four-day Hogmanay festival.

name: Edinburgh Hogmanay Street Party & Concert in the Gardens
venue_name: Princes Street and Princes Street Gardens
description: The Hogmanay Street Party on Princes Street and Concert in the Gardens is a major ticketed event drawing tens of thousands of revellers to welcome the New Year with live music and midnight fireworks over Edinburgh Castle.
